hyper3d_version.method: Hyper3D Rodin via fal.ai from concept art

assets.gameplay_job: Third-person player avatar with readable body, face direction, and glowing hammer silhouette during movement and combat.
assets.readability_requirement: Face, torso, hammer, and white-gold/dawn-blue team identity must read from the default UE5 camera.
assets.prompt_brief: Use STYLE_GUIDE.md and THEME_ALIGNMENT.md. character.light_warrior is a brave human champion channeling luminous guardian power, with white-gold/dawn-blue heroic readability.

hyper3d_version.method: Hyper3D Rodin via fal.ai from concept art

assets.gameplay_job: Small fast pressure enemy that teaches the player to read attack tells and answer darkness with Light Strike.
assets.readability_requirement: Violet-black silhouette, red-violet attack tell, and gold dissolve feedback must read from the default UE5 camera.
assets.prompt_brief: Use STYLE_GUIDE.md and THEME_ALIGNMENT.md. enemy.shadow_imp is embodied dark influence: angular violet-black body, bright readable attack tell, dissolves into reclaimed light on defeat.

assets.gameplay_job: Heavy pressure enemy that forces brave movement and teaches charge-tell recognition.
assets.readability_requirement: Large violet-black silhouette, red-violet charge tell, stun state, and gold defeat dissolve must read from the default UE5 camera.
assets.prompt_brief: Use STYLE_GUIDE.md and THEME_ALIGNMENT.md. enemy.berserker is dark influence as containment/retaliation: heavy angular silhouette, visible charge tell, violet-black corruption with limited red damage edge.

assets.gameplay_job: Show safety, danger, and restored territory without text.
assets.readability_requirement: Warm round safety, visible gold expansion, and clear boundary must not hide enemies or the player.
assets.prompt_brief: Use STYLE_GUIDE.md and THEME_ALIGNMENT.md. vfx.sacred_circle is the covenant field and reclaimed territory: white-gold ring, dawn-blue inner safety, visible radial expansion when bravery succeeds.

hyper3d_version.method: Hyper3D Rodin via fal.ai from concept art

assets.gameplay_job: Primary player weapon silhouette and impact source for Light Strike and Thunder Hammer moments.
assets.readability_requirement: Hammer head, grip, lightning core, and shockwave read during motion and attack frames.
assets.prompt_brief: Use STYLE_GUIDE.md and THEME_ALIGNMENT.md. weapon.thunder_hammer is luminous guardian power made physical: sacred gold, pale stone or electrum details, readable shockwave silhouette.

assets.gameplay_job: Sacred flat-world combat space with readable safe center, huge horizon, corruption pressure, and restored seams.
assets.readability_requirement: Combat lanes, circle boundary, temple landmark, light well, corruption, and restored seams must remain visible from the default UE5 camera.
assets.prompt_brief: Use STYLE_GUIDE.md and THEME_ALIGNMENT.md. environment.arena is sacred territory under dark influence: circular sanctuary, violet corruption outside, pale stone/gold restored seams.

assets.gameplay_job: Strong landmark and sacred technology objective outside the starting safety circle.
assets.readability_requirement: Temple silhouette, pedestal, activation core, approach lane, and collision footprint must read during combat.
assets.prompt_brief: UE5 FBX blockout candidate generated through video-engine. Theme role: sacred technology node outside safety, borrowing Egyptian resonance temple architecture and restored-node lighting from Tartaria support. Still needs UE5 import, scale review, UVs, materials, and Play-In-Editor evidence.

assets.gameplay_job: Small resource pickup that rewards brave movement outside the circle.
assets.readability_requirement: Ground glow and collected burst must read without being confused with enemy VFX.
assets.prompt_brief: Use STYLE_GUIDE.md and THEME_ALIGNMENT.md. pickup.light_shard is reclaimed light made collectible: warm gold shard with dawn-blue core.

assets.gameplay_job: Danger floor and world pressure material.
assets.readability_requirement: Corruption must signal danger without hiding enemies, player, or sacred circle boundary.
assets.prompt_brief: Use STYLE_GUIDE.md and THEME_ALIGNMENT.md. material.corruption is violet-black living pressure with restrained red-violet danger pulse.

assets.readability_requirement: Restored stone must make safety and progress visible while preserving combat readability.
assets.prompt_brief: Use STYLE_GUIDE.md and THEME_ALIGNMENT.md. material.restored_stone is pale sacred stone with warm gold inlays and dawn-blue resonance.

assets.gameplay_job: Icon language for health, courage, abilities, danger, and restoration.
assets.readability_requirement: Icons must work at HUD size without text.
assets.prompt_brief: Use STYLE_GUIDE.md and THEME_ALIGNMENT.md. ui.hud_icons are readable symbolic icons for Light Warrior's core verbs.

assets.gameplay_job: Upgrade selection visuals for Light Strike, Sacred Circle, and Thunder Hammer progress.
assets.readability_requirement: Cards must separate upgrade identity by icon and color without relying on text.
assets.prompt_brief: Use STYLE_GUIDE.md and THEME_ALIGNMENT.md. ui.upgrade_cards are icon-led sacred technology upgrade visuals.
Use STYLE_GUIDE.md and THEME_ALIGNMENT.md. audio.first_loop should combine heroic percussion/choir, warm luminous pads, temple chimes, and dark pressure layers.

Use STYLE_GUIDE.md and THEME_ALIGNMENT.md. audio.core_sfx should make bravery and restoration audible: dash shimmer, light strike, dark dissolve, circle expansion pulse, temple activation, hammer slam.

assets.gameplay_job: Final boss encounter. Towering dark-influence sovereign with corrupted crown, tri-eyes, three destructible phase orbs, shadow wings. Tests all player skills across three phases.
assets.readability_requirement: Crown silhouette, tri-eye glow, phase orbs, attack-tell claws, and rune channels must read from the default UE5 camera at boss-fight distance.
assets.prompt_brief: Use STYLE_GUIDE.md and THEME_ALIGNMENT.md. boss.corruption_sovereign is ultimate dark influence: towering void-black sovereign with corrupted crown, spectral robe, shadow wings, three phase orbs in diamond cages, violet rune power channels, red-violet attack-tell claws.
